info.title: Helix API
info.description: AI-native creative operating system for restaurants and food brands.

get.description: Begin Google OAuth — returns the URL the client should redirect to.
Google OAuth callback — exchanges code for tokens, upserts user, issues session.

schema.title: Response Providers Api V1 Auth Providers Get

post.description: Allows simulated developer logins when running locally or in development.

schema.title: Response Dev Bypass Api V1 Auth Dev Bypass Post

get.description:
Public plan catalog. Each plan reports whether it's available
(i.e., its Stripe price ID has been configured).

schema.title: Response List Plans Api V1 Billing Plans Get

get.description: Current subscription state for the authenticated user's org.

post.description: Start a Stripe Checkout flow for the chosen plan.
Open the Stripe Customer Portal so the user can manage payment + cancel.

Stripe webhook endpoint. Configure in Stripe dashboard:
URL: {API_PUBLIC_URL}/api/v1/billing/webhook

schema.title: Response Stripe Webhook Api V1 Billing Webhook Post

get.description: Get the organization for the currently authenticated user.
Get a specific organization. Users can only access their own organization.
Return the catalog of providers + the workspace's existing connections.

schema.title: Response List Integrations Api V1 Integrations Get

get.description: Issue an OAuth authorize URL. Frontend redirects the user to it.

schema.title: Response Connect Api V1 Integrations  Provider  Connect Get

get.description:
OAuth provider redirects the user here after consent.

Workspace identity is bound to the signed `state` issued by `/connect`,
so callback itself does not require a session cookie (the user may be
in a fresh browser tab post-OAuth). Tamper-resistance comes from the
signed state payload validated below.

post.description: Connect a token-based integration. User pastes their API key/bot token.

schema.title: Response Connect Token Api V1 Integrations  Provider  Connect Token Post
Response List Skills Api V1 Skills Get

get.description:
Recent learnings. When no brand_id is given, scoped to the caller's
organization's brands (plus global / non-brand learnings).

schema.title: Response Recent Learnings Api V1 Skills Learnings Recent Get
Response Get Skill Api V1 Skills  Name  Get
Response Toggle Skill Api V1 Skills  Name  Patch
Response Toggle Learning Api V1 Skills Learnings  Learning Id  Patch

get.description: Foundation context as every skill sees it, plus surrounding stats.

schema.title: Response Get Brand Memory Api V1 Memory Brands  Brand Id  Get

get.description: Unified event timeline (runs + assets + learnings) — newest first.

schema.title: Response Get Brand Timeline Api V1 Memory Brands  Brand Id  Timeline Get

get.description:
Force-directed graph of the brand's creative memory.

Per-kind row caps scale with `depth` and the configured page limit so
callers can dial detail without code changes.

schema.title: Response Get Brand Graph Api V1 Memory Brands  Brand Id  Graph Get

get.description: Return the unified Helix command-center state for the current user.

post.description: Initialize the persistent Helix workforce and default autonomy rules.

get.description: Return aggregated revenue metrics and predictions.
Return time-series metrics.

schema.title: Response Revenue Metrics Api V1 Intelligence Revenue Metrics Get

get.description: Return customer segments and cohort analysis.

post.description: Compute customer segments from order data.

schema.title: Response Compute Customer Segments Api V1 Intelligence Customers Compute Segments Post

get.description: Return tracked competitors and recent alerts.

schema.title: Response Track Competitor Api V1 Intelligence Competitors Track Post

get.description: Return intelligence signals.

schema.title: Response Acknowledge Signal Api V1 Intelligence Signals  Signal Id  Acknowledge Post
Response Dismiss Signal Api V1 Intelligence Signals  Signal Id  Dismiss Post

get.description: Return A/B experiments.

schema.title: Response List Experiments Api V1 Intelligence Experiments Get
Response Create Experiment Api V1 Intelligence Experiments Post

get.description: Return all optimization rules with their current status.

schema.title: Response List Optimization Rules Api V1 Intelligence Optimization Rules Get

post.description: Evaluate all optimization rules and return triggered actions.

schema.title: Response Evaluate Optimization Rules Api V1 Intelligence Optimization Evaluate Post

get.description: List pending approval requests.

schema.title: Response List Pending Approvals Api V1 Intelligence Optimization Approvals Get
Response Approve Optimization Api V1 Intelligence Optimization Approvals  Approval Id  Approve Post
Response Reject Optimization Api V1 Intelligence Optimization Approvals  Approval Id  Reject Post

get.description: Return history of executed optimization actions.

schema.title: Response Optimization History Api V1 Intelligence Optimization History Get

get.description: Return campaign health score and issues.

schema.title: Response Campaign Health Api V1 Intelligence Campaigns Health Get

get.description: Return creative fatigue signals.

schema.title: Response Creative Fatigue Api V1 Intelligence Campaigns Fatigue Get

get.description: Return actionable optimization signals.

schema.title: Response Optimization Signals Api V1 Intelligence Campaigns Optimize Get
Response List Assets Api V1 Assets Get
Response Get Asset Api V1 Assets  Asset Id  Get

get.description: Return presigned S3 URL for asset download/display.

schema.title: Response Get Asset Url Api V1 Assets  Asset Id  Url Get

get.description: Return presigned URL for webp thumbnail variant.

schema.title: Response Get Asset Thumbnail Api V1 Assets  Asset Id  Thumbnail Get

get.description: List the workflows available on this deployment.

schema.title: Response List Workflows Api V1 Workflows Get

get.description: Return visual nodes and edges for the compiled Helix workflow.

schema.title: Response Get Workflow Graph Api V1 Workflows  Workflow Name  Graph Get

get.description: Expose the LLM catalog so MCP clients can pick models too.

schema.title: Response List Mcp Models Api V1 Mcp Models Get

post.description:
Receives a Telegram update; runs it through the LLM and replies.

Public (no session) — Telegram's servers can't present a cookie. The
workspace_id in the URL is non-secret; abuse is mitigated by the fact
that no reply is sent unless that workspace has a valid bot token
registered, and by Telegram's own update_id dedup.

schema.title: Response Webhook Api V1 Telegram Webhook  Workspace Id  Post

post.description: Tell Telegram where to deliver updates. Run once after connecting.

schema.title: Response Register Webhook Api V1 Telegram Register Webhook Post

post.description: Manually send a Telegram message from Helix.

schema.title: Response Send Api V1 Telegram Send Post

get.description: Returns bot identity + webhook info if connected.

schema.title: Response Status Endpoint Api V1 Telegram Status Get

post.description: Publish a custom business event to trigger autonomous workflows.

schema.title: Response Post Event Api V1 Events Post

model.title: Model
model.description: Catalog model id, e.g. 'openai:gpt-4o-mini'. If omitted, picks the default chat model.

RunSummary.title: RunSummary
RunSummary.description: Lightweight list item — no large JSON payloads.

TokenConnect.title: TokenConnect
TokenConnect.description: Payload for token-based integrations (Telegram, Slack, Stripe, etc.).
